text: Stepping through these glass doors into a space dedicated to R&D, I feel a curious mixture of anticipation and reverence. The environment is meticulously designed—bright, orderly, and inviting reflection. The promise of innovation and the unknown fill the air, making me conscious of the human drive to explore, to learn, and to connect. Here, surrounded by representations of progress and questioning, I feel invigorated by possibility, yet humbled by the vastness of what remains to be understood.
